chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the positions (6th, 5th, 10th, 8th, 22nd (q), 10th, 9th, 6th, 8th, 5th, 3rd), the best result is 3rd, achieved in 2014 at the World Indoor Championships. Therefore, the year they ended up best is 2014.

judge_thought: Explanation: The "best" result corresponds to the highest placement.
